assets.mechanism: Dual GLP-1 and GIP receptor agonism
assets.differentiator: Subcutaneous dual GLP-1/GIP agonist in Phase 3 obesity program
assets.description: Lead metabolic program evaluating subcutaneous VK2735 for obesity.
assets.notes: Viking pipeline overview lists VK2735 Subcutaneous for obesity with Phase 3 in process and notes two Phase 3 clinical trials.

assets.mechanism: Oral dual GLP-1 and GIP receptor agonism
assets.description: Oral VK2735 formulation being evaluated for obesity.
assets.notes: Pipeline overview lists oral VK2735 for obesity with Phase 3 planned 3Q26; normalized to Phase 2 until Phase 3 starts. Dosing interval inferred from oral obesity program context and requires QA.

assets.mechanism: Dual GLP-1/GIP agonism evaluated across subcutaneous and oral maintenance dosing
assets.description: Exploratory maintenance dosing program for VK2735.
assets.notes: Pipeline overview lists VK2735 Sub-q & Oral for obesity-maintenance as Phase 1 in process.

extractionNotes: Small 01 screening pass limited to Viking Therapeutics.
Pipeline overview is the primary source; VK2735 profile page confirms dual GLP-1/GIP mechanism and both oral and subcutaneous formulations.
unresolvedQuestions: Confirm oral VK2735 normalized stage once Phase 3 initiation occurs.
